name: On the Granularity of Causal Effect Identifiability

description: arXiv:2510.16703v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The classical notion of causal effect identifiability is defined in terms of treatment and outcome variables. In this paper, we consider the identifiability of state-based causal effects: how an intervention on a particular state of treatment variables affects a particular state of outcome variables. We demonstrate that state-based causa...
author: Yizuo Chen, Adnan Darwiche
